sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49151" key="qriasth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θρῑαστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">θρῖον</etym>) <sense id="n49151.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">planter of fig-trees</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:140" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.140</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
